description: Cadbury aired an unconventional TV commercial in 2007 featuring a gorilla playing the drums to Phil Collins' 'In the Air Tonight'. The bizarre, non-product-centric ad was initially confusing but became a massive viral sensation, revitalizing the brand image in the UK.

key_events.description: First broadcast of the 'Gorilla' ad on UK television.
Initial audience confusion regarding why a gorilla is drumming for chocolate.
Ad goes viral on early YouTube platforms; massive search traffic spike.
Phil Collins' song re-enters the UK charts due to the ad's popularity.

calibration_notes: Useful for modeling 'bizarre' marketing strategies that overcome initial skepticism to achieve high levels of audience recall and brand affinity.
